body_txt: Super Doc is the only doctor in town/on the starship/in the expedition. They may have a canon field of expertise, but when called on, he can treat ANYTHING. Often in sci-fi settings, they have no nurses or other doctors to help them, sometimes with quite limited resources, and must sometimes learn and treat an alien's anatomy after about five minutes looking at it, or diagnose weird new illnesses at the drop of a hat. Even against all these odds, they usually have a high success rate. After all, they're the Super Doc! Compare Open Heart Dentistry ; contrast Not That Kind of Doctor . A subtrope of Omnidisciplinary Scientist and The Medic . A Super Doc can be used as an excuse for The Main Characters Do Everything .
